name: Jake Makes It Easy
overview: Jake Makes it Easy provides viewers a step-by-step process for creating a main course and dessert that incorporate aspects from classic dishes and unique flavors all while keeping it simple. Having worked in some of New York City?s top restaurants and test kitchens, Jake brings his impressive culinary background and love of hosting to create inspired meals fit for any table.

trailers.title: "Jake Makes it Easy" Makes Entertaining Simple Beginning 10/28 on FYI
